notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes an ongoing battle scene (围杀) with public events visible to all participants. No private knowledge, secret plans, or future-known information is directly supported by the source pointers. Events like 武庸 having a '后手' (hidden move) are mentioned but the source pointers only show surface-level quotes (e.g., '武庸果然和武独秀不一样' from p0027) without revealing what the hidden move actually is or that 武庸 knows it privately. The陶铸传承 opening is a public event witnessed by all. No fact meets the criteria of being a hidden/future-known/player-visibility atomic fact with direct source backing.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed primarily describes a large-scale battle scene (围杀方源) with multiple combat actions. While we see characters acting (武庸 attacking, 方源 chasing 君神光), the observed behaviors are tactical combat actions in a chaotic battle. No clear character motive beyond 'survive/win the fight' can be directly observed from the seed facts. Any inferred motive about deeper strategic intent (e.g., why 武庸 built the formation, why 方源 targets 君神光 specifically) would require psychological leaps not supported by the seed. Only combat actions are visible; motives are ambiguous.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed primarily describes an ongoing battle (围杀) between Fang Yuan (individual) and Southern Border immortals (南疆群仙 as a loose collective). While 武家 and 乔家 appear as named factions, their stakes are indirect: 武庸 is the commander but acts as an individual; 乔家 contributed陶铸 inheritance线索 under pressure from 武庸, but this is past/present fact rather than a forward pressure axis. 乔丝柳's personal emotional reaction (心情复杂 about 方源) is individual, not a faction pressure. No clear faction-level interest, threat, resource, reputation, geography, succession, or inheritance pressure with conservative one-step reactions can be confidently extracted from this seed alone.
IF export filter quarantined 8 legacy old-schema branches.
